prompts.name: Soft Facial Features
prompts.text: Give the subject soft, balanced facial features with gentle contours, clear expression, and natural appeal.

prompts.name: Sharp Facial Features
prompts.text: Give the subject sharper facial features with defined cheekbones, focused eyes, and a confident presence.

prompts.name: Round Cheeks
prompts.text: Give the subject softly rounded cheeks for a cute, friendly look while keeping proportions natural.

prompts.name: Delicate Nose
prompts.text: Use a delicate nose shape with subtle shading and balanced facial harmony.

prompts.name: Defined Jawline
prompts.text: Use a more defined jawline with clean facial structure and confident character presence.

prompts.name: Small Mouth
prompts.text: Use a small, delicate mouth with clear expression and soft natural detail.

prompts.name: Full Lips
prompts.text: Use fuller lips with tasteful shaping, natural highlights, and balanced facial proportions.

prompts.name: Subtle Freckles
prompts.text: Add subtle freckles across the cheeks and nose for natural charm and believable skin detail.

prompts.name: Beauty Mark
prompts.text: Add a small beauty mark placed naturally on the face as a tasteful character detail.

prompts.name: Rosy Cheeks
prompts.text: Add soft rosy cheeks that enhance warmth, emotion, and natural expression.

prompts.name: Delicate Eyelashes
prompts.text: Add delicate eyelashes that frame the eyes without overpowering the face.

prompts.name: Thicker Eyebrows
prompts.text: Use slightly thicker eyebrows to create stronger expression and character identity.

prompts.name: Thin Eyebrows
prompts.text: Use thin, refined eyebrows for an elegant and polished facial look.

prompts.name: Balanced Face
prompts.text: Keep the face balanced and symmetrical with coherent proportions, natural expression, and clean feature placement.

prompts.name: Expressive Face
prompts.text: Emphasize an expressive face with clear eyes, readable emotion, and appealing facial animation.
